name: Lambda Function
description: AWS Lambda serverless function for event-driven computing

inputs.name: function_name
inputs.label: Function Name
inputs.description: A unique name for the Lambda function

inputs.name: description
inputs.label: Description
inputs.description: Description of the Lambda function

inputs.name: handler
inputs.label: Handler
inputs.description: Function entrypoint in your code

inputs.name: runtime
inputs.label: Runtime
inputs.description: Lambda execution runtime environment

inputs.name: memory_size
inputs.label: Memory (MB)
inputs.description: Memory allocation (128-10240 MB, also determines CPU)

inputs.name: timeout
inputs.label: Timeout (seconds)
inputs.description: Function timeout in seconds (max 900)

inputs.name: source_path
inputs.label: Source Path
inputs.description: Path to Lambda source code directory

inputs.name: architectures
inputs.label: Architecture
inputs.description: Instruction set architecture (arm64 for Graviton, cheaper)

inputs.name: package_type
inputs.label: Package Type
inputs.description: Deployment package type

inputs.name: image_uri
inputs.label: Container Image URI
inputs.description: ECR image URI (required when package_type is Image)

inputs.name: environment_variables
inputs.label: Environment Variables
inputs.description: Environment variables as key = value pairs (one per line)

inputs.name: reserved_concurrent_executions
inputs.label: Reserved Concurrency
inputs.description: Reserved concurrent executions (-1 for unreserved, 0 to disable)

inputs.name: ephemeral_storage_size
inputs.label: Ephemeral Storage (MB)
inputs.description: /tmp storage in MB (512-10240)

inputs.name: publish
inputs.label: Publish Version
inputs.description: Publish each change as a new Lambda version

inputs.name: create_lambda_function_url
inputs.label: Function URL
inputs.description: Create a Lambda Function URL for HTTP access

inputs.name: authorization_type
inputs.label: Function URL Auth
inputs.description: Authentication for Function URL

inputs.name: vpc_subnet_ids
inputs.label: VPC Subnet IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated subnet IDs to run Lambda in VPC

inputs.name: vpc_security_group_ids
inputs.label: VPC Security Group IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated security group IDs for VPC mode

inputs.name: attach_network_policy
inputs.label: VPC Network Policy
inputs.description: Attach VPC network policy to the Lambda role

inputs.name: layers
inputs.label: Lambda Layers
inputs.description: Comma-separated Lambda Layer ARNs (max 5)

inputs.name: dead_letter_target_arn
inputs.label: Dead Letter Queue ARN
inputs.description: SNS topic or SQS queue ARN for failed invocations

inputs.name: tracing_mode
inputs.label: X-Ray Tracing
inputs.description: AWS X-Ray tracing mode

inputs.name: attach_tracing_policy
inputs.label: Tracing IAM Policy
inputs.description: Attach X-Ray tracing policy to the Lambda role

inputs.name: cloudwatch_logs_retention_in_days
inputs.label: Log Retention (days)
inputs.description: CloudWatch Logs retention period

inputs.name: logging_log_format
inputs.label: Log Format
inputs.description: Lambda log format (JSON for structured logging)

inputs.name: logging_application_log_level
inputs.label: Application Log Level
inputs.description: Application log level (when using JSON format)

inputs.name: kms_key_arn
inputs.label: KMS Key ARN
inputs.description: KMS key ARN to encrypt environment variables

inputs.name: snap_start
inputs.label: SnapStart
inputs.description: Enable SnapStart for low-latency cold starts (Java only)
